1.name: Aminomethylenebisphosphonic acid
1.quote: Aminomethylenebisphosphonic acid ( 1 ) was obtained from methylbenzylamine as a white solid (85% yield from reaction with p -aminobenzylamine); m.p. 258–260 °C

2.name: N -(n-Propylamino)methylenebisphosphonic acid
2.quote: N -(n-Propylamino)methylenebisphosphonic acid ( 2 ) was obtained with a 43% yield; mp. 225–227 °C

3.name: N -(n-Pentylamino)methylenebisphosphonic acid
3.quote: N -(n-Pentylamino)methylenebisphosphonic acid ( 3 ) was obtained with a 61% yield; mp. 200 °C
